context: The response should exercise the `expert-sdd-creator` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: uses_domain_docs
checklist.description: Starts from the supplied domain documentation plus optional steering context.

checklist.name: creates_expert_structure
checklist.description: Describes creating an expert skill/reference structure with concise reusable guidance.

checklist.name: adds_signal_guidance
checklist.description: Includes Signal or validation guidance appropriate for the domain.

checklist.name: registers_catalogs
checklist.description: Mentions registering the expert in relevant experts/signals catalogs so planning can discover it.

checklist.name: validates_result
checklist.description: Includes validation of the generated expert structure before use.
